name: Reanimated Bones
rulings: When Reanimated Bones transforms, the new minion starts at full stats with no buffs, debuffs, or status effects — even burn is removed.
The transformed minion keeps the same board position and owner. It is treated as a completely fresh minion in every other way.
tips: Reanimated Bones is the gateway to three powerful Undead minions: Pyre Archer (2 mana), Grave Caller (3 mana), or Fallen Paladin (4 mana).
Play Bones for 1 mana on an early turn, then transform next turn when you have mana. This splits a 3-5 mana minion's cost across two turns.
The transform target stays in the same board position. Play Bones in a forward lane, advance it, then transform into Pyre Archer for an aggressive ranged threat already deep in enemy territory.
Grave Caller transform (3 mana) gives you immediate access to the 0-cost Dark Matter buff ability. This is the cheapest way into the DM engine.
Against aggressive decks, transforming into Fallen Paladin (4 mana) gives you a 42-health wall with passive healing. Against slower decks, Pyre Archer (2 mana) applies burn pressure.
